Interrupts.name: INT_ENABLE
Interrupts.description: Register enables interrupt generation by interrupt sources.

fields.name: FIFO_OFLOW_EN
fields.description: When set to 1, this bit enables a FIFO buffer overflow to generate an interrupt.

fields.name: I2C_MST_INT_EN
fields.description: When set to 1, this bit enables any of the I2C Master interrupt sources to generate an interrupt.

fields.name: DATA_RDY_EN
fields.description: When set to 1, this bit enables the Data Ready interrupt, which occurs each time a write operation to all of the sensor registers has been completed.
